ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant registered */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the participant belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., Prone, Standing, Kneeling) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., individual, team) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who scored */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being scored */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the participant in the event */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits achieved by the participant */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the score was recorded */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Round number of the event */,
  "target_number" INTEGER /* Target number used in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant being ranked */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being ranked */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the participant in the event */,
  "total_score" INTEGER /* Total score of the participant in the competition */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the ranking was updated */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Round number of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the captain of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("captain_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the member belongs to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who is a team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., captain, member) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant joined the team */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the team member (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competition_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the statistic */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the statistic */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the statistic was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_scores" (
  "event_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event score */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being scored */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who scored */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the participant in the event */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits achieved by the participant */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the score was recorded */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Round number of the event */,
  "target_number" INTEGER /* Target number used in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_scores_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_scores_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competition_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who received the result */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the participant in the competition */,
  "total_score" INTEGER /* Total score of the participant in the competition */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the result was recorded */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Round number of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_results_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)
